text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Japanese Derby.

The anticipation from the stands for<n>the
showdown between the three<n>members of BNW is
so strong, it's<n>practically palpable from the waiting
room.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone used to freak out about the<n>"top two"
but now it's all about<n>BNW...
choice_data_list: People are finally taking you seriously.
People are finally taking you seriously.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Pfft. Are they? The Triple Crown is<n>three races,
and the Satsuki Sho's<n>the only one done.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They may be singing about me now,<n>but public
opinion can change in the<n>blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I get ahead of myself, there's no<n>way I'm going
to win against her.

There's no doubt who Narita Taishin<n>is talking
about.

Winning Ticket—the one who's been<n>utterly
obsessed with becoming a<n>Derby champion.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
My goal hasn't changed. I'm gonna<n>win and
show the world what I'm<n>made of.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Until then, I can't let my guard down.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, here I go.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hello, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide. Where is she?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Not here yet. I think she's planning to<n>stay in the
waiting room until right<n>before the start of the race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Have you noticed how for these past<n>few days
she...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hasn't been talking to us? Yeah.<n>She's probably
doing that to stay<n>focused.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Heh. You really do pay attention to<n>everything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's just easy to notice when<n>someone as
unhinged as her<n>suddenly goes dead quiet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But it doesn't matter. I'm going to<n>win.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I could say the same to you.

Thus begins the Classic Triple<n>Crown's second
race, the Japanese<n>Derby—and the showdown
between<n>the top three!
